emails.subject: Iroquois Gas
emails.body: Any concerns to forward to Becky Cantrell by Friday the 11th of Aug.???? We currently only have a 2017 dkt/d term contract #125005, a 35,465 dkt/d term contract #125008, an IT contract and a parking and loaning contract to handle our Canadian term supply. We typically transport to markets off Iroquois, to Tennnessee pipeline and CNG pipeline. That is a simplified summary of our daily activity on Iroquois. If you need any information, please let me know. Forwarded by Victor Lamadrid/HOU/ECT on 08/10/2000 08:37 AM Enron North America Corp. From: Rebecca W Cantrell 08/09/2000 07:39 PM

emails.subject: Re: Iroquois Gas
emails.body: Re: Iroquois Gas Thanks for pointing this out. To my knowledge we have never even tried to overlap the contract or do any segmenting. Enron North America Corp. From: Victor Lamadrid 08/10/2000 08:58 AM
